nasb.text: The house of Israel named it manna, and it was like coriander seed, white, and its taste was like wafers with honey.

esv.text: Now the house of Israel called its name manna. It was like coriander seed, white, and the taste of it was like wafers made with honey.

cnv.text: 以色列家給這食物起名叫“嗎哪”，它像芫荽的種子，色白，味道像攙蜜的薄餅。

ccb.text: 以色列人称这种食物为吗哪，它形状像芫荽的种子，白色，味道像用蜜糖制成的薄饼。
